positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a celestial forest canopy. The main subject is an intricate, overlapping pattern of bioluminescent flora and fauna silhouetted against a deep indigo gradient sky. Features include geometricized roots, glowing abstract spores, and crescent moons nestled among the leaves. Style is 'Art Deco meets Scientific Illustration,' rendered with thick, clean lines and high contrast. Composition is perfectly centered and symmetrical, maximizing usable negative space around the main pattern elements. Color palette is restricted to electric teal, deep sapphire, ivory, and charcoal black, ensuring excellent print definition. Suitable for all-over garment printing, highly scalable and aesthetically pleasing.
negative: blur, smudge, noise, grain, low detail, text, watermark, signature, artifact, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cartoon, photorealism, graffiti
